---
title: "tidyverse"
format: html
---

# 常用函数

## replace_na()

**Example 1:**

```{r}
# 向量
library(tidyr)

x <- c("a", NA, "b")
x <- replace_na(x, "")
x
```

**Example 2:**

```{r}
# 批量处理多个变量
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

df <- tibble(
  id    = 1:6,
  name  = c("Alice", NA, "Charlie", "David", NA, "Frank"),
  score = c(90, 85, NA, 88, 92, NA),
  date  = as.Date(c("2024-01-01", NA, "2024-01-03", "2024-01-04", NA, "2024-01-06"))
)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ replace_na(.x, "")))

```

## recode()

**Example 1:**

```{r}
x <- c("a", "b", "a", "c", "d", "c")

lookup <- c(
  "a" = "A",
  "b" = "B",
  "c" = "C",
  "d" = "D"
)

recode(x, !!!lookup)
```
